## Verification

- [ ] `swift run DeadAirChecks`
- [ ] `swift build -c release -Xswiftc -warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] Manual launch tested when UI/audio behavior changed
- [ ] Docs updated when setup, signing, or user workflow changed

## Show Safety

- [ ] Audio playback/fade behavior is unchanged or intentionally verified
- [ ] MIDI/OSC/lighting failures remain non-blocking
- [ ] Referenced-file and sandbox behavior are preserved
